document_profile.title: Acceptable Use Policy
document_profile.purpose: Define acceptable use of corporate IT systems.
document_profile.executive_summary: Sets out the rules and responsibilities for using company IT resources.

sections.heading: Scope
sections.text: This policy applies to all employees, contractors, and third parties.

sections.heading: Responsibilities
sections.text: Users must safeguard credentials and report incidents promptly.

assets.text: All security incidents must be reported within 24 hours.
Does this policy cover personal devices used for work?
